title: Makbannay #4344
definition:
Machbanai = "bond of the Lord"

 1) a Gadite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag
nasbUsage:
Definition: Machbanai = "bond of the Lord"

 1) a Gadite and one of David's mighty warriors who joined him at Ziklag

    NASB:  one of Davids heroes
